paths.name: P9_fix_crit2_btc30d_regime_gate
paths.mechanism: btc_30d=0.0 across all 69 days in regime_router output suggests regime gate is silently no-op; fixing may unsuppress winners or surface a separate bug
paths.falsifier: after fix, re-run Stage 1 23-day chunk at p_fill=0.30; if realized %/d delta is <0.01, gate was already correctly inert

paths.name: P7_4h_cadence_smoke_inst_a_exp_1_2
paths.mechanism: Existing Cycle 8 win_3pct_12bar 4h classifier already shows OOS AUC 0.60 / P@100=0.63; porting to scoring + adapter on UNSEEN may unlock structural lift via 1440x bar density vs daily
paths.falsifier: score 4h classifier on UNSEEN segment (last 4.7 months); if Top-K=10 adapter realized < +0.20%/d OR DSR-Sh < 1.0, 4h port not worth 2-4 weeks of follow-on work

paths.name: P8_te_btc_imb_drop_v2_v2oi_meta_blend
paths.mechanism: INST-A framework Phase 1 Exp 1.1 — drop dead feature te_btc_imb (flagged by Opus auditor a4c0a0fba19024c19), retrain v2, wire v2/v2oi meta-blend with regime-router (BTC 30d >=+5% -> v2; else -> v2oi)
paths.falsifier: if retrained v2 IC < 0.04 on OOS OR meta-blend %/d < +0.15 on UNSEEN replay, drop blends and continue

paths.name: P5_xsec_topK_cycling_layered_on_regime_router
paths.mechanism: Add cross-sectional Top-K ranker on top of REGIME_ROUTER signals; pick top 5 ranked assets/day from regime_router shortlist instead of dispatching all selectors
paths.falsifier: paper_trade_replay_v3 with TopK=5 selector layered; if realized %/d delta < +0.05 vs unranked baseline, ranking layer adds no value

paths.name: P1_maker_mode_calibration_tuning
paths.mechanism: Tune maker quote-laddering to lift effective p_fill from honest 0.30 to 0.40-0.45; sweep adverse_selection assumptions
paths.falsifier: sweep p_fill in {0.25, 0.35, 0.45} on Stage 1 23-day chunk; if delta(%/d) < +0.05 from 0.30 baseline, maker tuning provides no marginal lift

paths.name: P3_smart_discovery_fibonacci_sma_u50_scaleout
paths.mechanism: Fibonacci SMA(5,34) +1311% NAV beat brute-force SMA(28,29) +896% per claude_instance_state_2026_05_20_smart_discovery; scale across u50
paths.falsifier: u50 sweep; if any per-asset Fibonacci SMA delivers <+50% NAV on u100-cohort coverage, the +1311% was selection-bias single-asset noise

paths.name: P10_inverse_vol_position_sizing
paths.mechanism: Per Q5 finding, inverse-vol position sizing is within mandate but unexplored. Scale sleeve weights by 1/sigma_asset
paths.falsifier: backtest with sigma-conditioned sleeve weights vs equal-weight on Stage 1 baseline; if Sharpe lift < 0.3 AND %/d delta < +0.03, inverse-vol adds no value at this signal strength

paths.name: P4_setup_filter_0_60_to_0_75
paths.mechanism: Tighten setup_filter threshold from 0.60 to 0.75 per Sprint 5 queue; should improve win-rate at cost of trade frequency
paths.falsifier: walk-forward at 0.75 threshold; if win-rate doesn't lift >5pp OR trade count drops >50% with %/d delta < +0.03, threshold tuning saturated

paths.name: P6_wm_signal_as_sizer_v16_cohort
paths.mechanism: Use V1.6 + ShIC>0.03 cohort WM signal as Kelly sizer multiplier (not standalone alpha); ShIC ratio gate
paths.falsifier: 1mo OOS with WM-sizer multiplier vs equal-weight; if Sharpe lift < 0.2, WM signal not informative as sizer at this strength

paths.name: P2_per_asset_ma_ema_path_A_revisit
paths.mechanism: NOT_DEPLOYED 2026-05-20 already refuted v3 truth +2.99% vs offline +91% (30x backtest inflation). Re-verify dead before fully sunsetting
paths.falsifier: re-run v3 truth at p_fill=0.30 via CLI override; if realized delta > +0.05%/d from current state, path is NOT actually dead

ranking_by_eig_per_dollar.name: P3_smart_discovery_fibonacci_u50_scaleout

next_action: Dispatch P9 and P7 as parallel Opus domain-workers in current autonomy window; queue rest for second batch after first results land

inputs.adapter_blend: CYCLE8_WIN_CAPTURE_4H_LO (top_k=5 daily, min_pwin=0.40, size_pct=0.08, max_hold=12 4h-bars=2d, +3% TP, -1.5% SL, p_fill=0.30)
inputs.unseen_window: 2026-01-22 to 2026-05-19 (118 calendar days, 103 active trading days; 15 trailing zero-NAV days)

decision_rule_eval.rationale: realized 0.013%/d <<<+0.20%/d threshold; max-DD 19.9% > 15% allowance; DSR -4.3 << +1.5; 4h sub-day port is NOT a free lift in current cohort. Heavy concentration in stop_loss (36%) and max_hold (34%) vs take_profit (30%) means -1.5% SL and 12-bar timeout dominate over the +3% TP target.

caveats: Deployed adapter uses K=5 with daily aggregation (MAX p_win over 6 4h bars) NOT the framework spec K=10 raw 4h entries; if K=10 4h-bar reentries were tested separately the result could differ but the underlying classifier OOS AUC 0.60 / P@100 0.63 makes a 4x lift implausible
p_fill=0.30 (calibrated); FUTURES mode (per replay banner funding rates NOT modeled, NAV likely 5-15pp optimistic on 304-d run — this run is 118d so smaller drag)
15 trailing days (May 4-19) had zero entries — the predictions parquet may not extend to the latest 4h window, slightly understating the active-day base; using 103 active days for arith Sharpe
Win rate 43% net combined with avg-loss > avg-win (stop_loss count > take_profit count) explains low %/d despite reasonable hit rate

DSR-Sharpe uses Bailey & Lopez de Prado N_trials=20 approximation; even with N_trials=1 (no multiple-testing penalty) annual Sharpe of 0.33 has SE ~1.89 so 90% Sharpe CI [-2.78, +3.44] — uninformative
Cycle 8 OOS prec@100 = 0.63 was already a borderline signal; classifier-level evidence already suggested this adapter could not clear DSR>=1.5
falsifier_definition: Top-K=10 adapter realized < +0.20%/d OR DSR-Sh < 1.0 -> 4h port not worth 2-4 weeks of follow-on work
next_action: DOWN-WEIGHT 4h sub-day cadence as standalone alpha source. Optional follow-on: test K=10 raw 4h-bar entries (cheap, ~1hr) to fully match framework spec before fully closing the path. Re-allocate prior weight to P5_xsec_topK and P1_maker_calibration which remain in queue.

diagnosis: CRIT-2 is a FALSE ALARM. regime_router_sleeve.py:142-146 + run_blend.py:992-1001 (RED TEAM C1 fix 2026-05-17) already correctly propagate btc_30d. Prior 69-day run had btc_30d=0.0 because --no-regime-gate was used; with gate ON btc_30d propagates correctly (22/23 days non-zero, range [-0.0024, +0.0395]).
falsifier_definition: after fix, re-run Stage 1 23-day chunk at p_fill=0.30; if realized %/d delta is <0.01, gate was already correctly inert
rationale: regime_gate=True, btc_30d propagates correctly, but btc_30d range [-0.0024, +0.0395] stays on one side of regime_flip_threshold for the 23-day window. Gate is functioning, just structurally inert for this window — no positions get force-closed. CRIT-2 closes as a documentation/labeling issue (the prior --no-regime-gate flag was the cause of the zeros).
caveats: One legitimate zero-day (2026-04-29) when long_only strips all intents pre-fallback
Original 69-day run not on disk; cannot verify directly whether it was --no-regime-gate or stale pre-2026-05-17 binary
next_action: Close P9. Document CRIT-2 as resolved (false alarm). Realize no marginal lift from this path.

decision_rule_eval.rationale: +0.158%/d lift from 0.30->0.45 is 3.2x the +0.05 trigger threshold; falsifier did NOT fire. Maker p_fill is a real lever (monotone positive response, +0.105 %/d per +0.10 p_fill). But linear extrapolation needs p_fill~0.64 to hit +0.50%/d, well above the calibrated empirical bucket maximum (~0.40 per maker_cost_calibration.yaml), so maker tuning alone cannot close the +1%/d gap (would need synergy with other paths).

meta_implication_for_1_pct_per_day: Maker p_fill is a partial lever, NOT a closer. Even at unrealistic p_fill=0.45 the strategy delivers +0.30%/d, ~3.3x short of +1%/d target. P1 raises the deployable floor and improves the unit economics (Sharpe 7.5 -> 9.8-11.5; max DD -0.88% -> -0.30 to -0.41%) but the +1%/d gap must come from signal / cycling / setup-density paths (P3, P5, P10), not from execution tuning alone.
caveats: The 0.25 -> 0.30 step shows essentially zero %/d change (+0.001%/d) with trade count rising from 29 to 31 and Sharpe ~flat; the response curve is non-linear at the low end (kicks in above 0.30) — suggests the regime_router/setup_filter pipeline already filters most quote attempts and only the marginal fills above ~0.30 add net positive PnL.

Linear extrapolation to 0.50 %/d assumes the +0.105 %/d per +0.10 p_fill slope holds beyond 0.45 — likely overstated due to adverse-selection (filled trades are dip-biased; higher p_fill captures more marginal-quality fills).

Sharpe peaks at p_fill=0.35 (11.46) and degrades at 0.45 (9.79) despite higher absolute return — consistent with the adverse-selection mechanism: more fills include lower-quality marginal trades, diluting risk-adjusted return.

Win rate climbs 51.7 -> 55.3 -> 54.7% across the sweep — modest but real; the marginal fills are NOT systematically bad, but trade count nearly doubles (29 -> 53) so absolute capital deployment grows.

23-day window is short (1 month, n_trades=29-53); replication on the Stage 1 119-day universe would tighten the confidence interval — current results have wide CIs (similar to Stage 1 [-0.04, +0.32]).

These backtests assume the empirical p_fill OVERRIDE applies uniformly across buckets; in practice maker fill rates differ by bucket per maker_cost_calibration.yaml (0.21-0.40 range). A real maker-quote-laddering upgrade may not hit a single global p_fill but instead lift the per-bucket distribution — outcome similar in expectation but may shift trade-mix composition.
falsifier_definition: sweep p_fill in {0.25,0.35,0.45} on Stage 1 23-day chunk; if delta(%/d) < +0.05 from 0.30 baseline, maker tuning provides no marginal lift
next_action: RAISE P1 prior 0.20 -> 0.35 (+15pp UP per decision rule). Recommend META queue: (a) implement actual maker-quote-laddering logic (not just override flag) targeting per-bucket p_fill lift toward empirical ceiling 0.40-0.45 calibration; (b) re-run on 119-day Stage 1 universe to tighten CIs; (c) test maker tuning STACKED with P5 (xsec top-K) and P10 (inverse-vol sizing) since execution tuning is multiplicative with signal-quality improvements. DO NOT commit production_blends.yaml override of p_fill — current 0.30 default is honest; a 0.45 production setting requires the actual maker-laddering implementation, not just a flag flip.

K=5_canonical.note: Filter NEVER FIRES at K=5; regime_router (simple_momentum K=5 + ta_sml ~5) already self-caps at 5 daily intents. Bit-identical to baseline.

decision_rule_eval.rule: realized %/d delta vs +0.142 baseline: >=+0.05 -> P5 UP (+15pp); [-0.02, +0.05] -> stays; < -0.02 -> P5 DOWN (-15pp)
decision_rule_eval.branch_fired: STAYS (canonical K=5 delta=0.00 within band; best sweep K=4 delta=+0.019 still well below +0.05 threshold and within CI overlap with baseline)
decision_rule_eval.rationale: At canonical K=5 the filter is structurally a no-op because the underlying REGIME_ROUTER (simple_momentum K=5 or ta_sml ~5 picks) already emits at most 5 daily intents. Sweep across K in {2,3,4} probes the actual selectivity effect: tightening DESTROYS value (K=2 -0.038%/d, K=3 -0.006%/d) and even the best K=4 only adds +0.019%/d, below the +0.05 falsifier threshold and inside the bootstrap CI overlap [0.048, 0.286] vs baseline. The cross-sectional ranking layer on TOP of an already-ranked sleeve (momentum is itself a rank-by-1d-return cycler) adds no marginal alpha at this signal strength on this window.

meta_implication_on_1pct_per_d: NEGATIVE. The lift floor from +0.142%/d to the user-mandated +1%/d target cannot be closed via xsec selection on TOP of an already-selectivity-rich sleeve. Signal-selection space appears saturated at this fee structure (p_fill=0.30 maker). META posterior on +1%/d shifts further toward BEAR for the SELECTION-layer arm; the remaining viable arms are RAW-SIGNAL-STRENGTH (P3 Fibonacci u50 scaleout +0.30 prior, P10 inverse-vol sizing +0.20, P4 setup_filter 0.60->0.75) and SUB-DAY CADENCE which P7 already refuted.
caveats: Single 23-day window; statistical power low (DSR -0.4 to -1.0 across all K values, none clearing DSR>=1.0)

Only tested vs predicted_ret field already on intents; did NOT load ml_asset_ranker.py model (would require feature pipeline + scoring path not in scope). The ranker exists at src/strategy/ml/ml_asset_ranker.py but uses y_ret_5d label + feature_names from training schema -- integration would need a per-day feature builder

REGIME_ROUTER routes BULL->simple_momentum (K=5 picks by 1d gain) / BEAR->ta_sml; in this window the bull path dominated. simple_momentum is itself a top-K-by-ret rank; layering top-K on top is double-ranking on same signal -> no marginal info
P5 layered on a DIFFERENT base sleeve (e.g. a many-intent sleeve like ml_decision_stack that emits 10-20 candidates/day) could still show value -- this run only refutes P5 on top of REGIME_ROUTER
falsifier_definition: paper_trade_replay_v3 with TopK=5 selector layered; if realized %/d delta < +0.05 vs unranked baseline, ranking layer adds no value
next_action: CLOSE P5 on REGIME_ROUTER substrate. Re-allocate prior to P3 (smart_discovery_fibonacci_u50_scaleout, prior 0.30, raw-signal arm) and P10 (inverse_vol_sizing, prior 0.20, sizer arm). Consider P5-variant on a MANY-INTENT base sleeve (e.g. ml_decision_stack) IF such a sleeve becomes the next deploy candidate.

notes: Levers are independent (91% efficiency >= 90% threshold). Both P1 and P5 can ship together. Slight sub-additivity likely from K=4 reducing opportunity set under maker partial-fill regime.
